hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const o=JSON.parse(d);const f=(o.tool_input&&o.tool_input.file_path)||'';if(/\.(ts|tsx)$/.test(f)){const {execSync}=require('child_process');try{const r=execSync('cd \"C:/Users/themi/Desktop/projets/LifeIsARealBook/sabbah-de-babel\" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1',{encoding:'utf8',shell:'bash'});if(r.trim())process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'TypeScript errors:\n'+r}}));}catch(e){process.stdout.write(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'TypeScript errors:\n'+(e.stdout||e.message)}}));}}});" 2>/dev/null || true
